description: Inputs containing Unicode escape sequences, null bytes, or control characters that exploit JSON.parse's escape handling. The atomic emit uses a nonAsciiRejector gate that fires before any parsing, so escape sequences embedded in the raw input string are caught at the top-level ASCII check.

inputs.label: unicode-escape-in-string
inputs.rationale: String element with unicode escape; SyntaxError on '"' at first element position

inputs.label: high-unicode-in-brackets
inputs.rationale: Cyrillic chars (U+0410+) are > 127; nonAsciiRejector fires before any parsing (RangeError)

inputs.label: emoji-injection
inputs.rationale: Emoji surrogate pair (U+1F600) — code points > 127; nonAsciiRejector fires (RangeError)

inputs.label: tab-in-element
inputs.rationale: Tab (U+0009) is ASCII whitespace <= 127; nonAsciiRejector passes it. optionalWhitespace handles tabs. Parses as [1].

inputs.label: backslash-injection
inputs.rationale: Backslash (ASCII 92) after digit triggers SyntaxError — not a valid continuation

inputs.label: newline-in-list
inputs.rationale: Newline (U+000A) between elements — not valid whitespace in spec grammar; SyntaxError

inputs.label: carriage-return-in-list
inputs.rationale: CR (U+000D) between elements — not valid whitespace in spec grammar; SyntaxError

inputs.label: backspace-in-list
inputs.rationale: Backspace (U+0008) between elements — control char causes SyntaxError

inputs.label: form-feed-in-list
inputs.rationale: Form feed (U+000C) between elements — control char causes SyntaxError

inputs.label: high-surrogate-only
inputs.rationale: Lone high surrogate (U+D800) — code > 127 triggers nonAsciiRejector RangeError

inputs.label: latin-extended-chars
inputs.rationale: Latin extended characters (accented letters, code > 127) — nonAsciiRejector fires

inputs.label: valid-spaces-benign
inputs.rationale: Spaces around integers are valid per spec — control input
